title: Analytics - Events are gathered if user is logged in
scenario: Analytics events (e.g. device_added with Serial Number) are collected and count increments in Firebase when user is logged into Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Log into the app using valid credentials.
4. Pair or connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2) to trigger the device_added event.
5. Open Firebase Console and navigate to the Analytics events dashboard for the Poly Studio Mobile project.
6. Locate the device_added event in the event list.
7. Note the current event count for device_added.
8. Repeat step 4 (pair/connect the same or another device) to trigger another device_added event.
9. Return to Firebase Console and refresh the Analytics events dashboard.
10. Check the updated event count for device_added.
expected: The event count for device_added in Firebase Analytics should increase by at least 1 after each pairing/connection event.
